程序包 com.qq.recruitment.util

类 InputValidator

java.lang.Object
com.qq.recruitment.util.InputValidator
public final class InputValidator extends Object
Utility for input validation and normalization. Validates usernames, passwords, roles, text fields, and tag lists against security constraints. All methods are static; this class cannot be instantiated.

  • 方法概要
